_comment: Source URLs for this skill's reference files. Run scripts/update-references.py to refresh.

references/providers.md.covers: Provider configuration, model syntax, authentication, Anthropic/OpenAI/Bedrock/Vertex/Ollama setup, apiKey format, provider options

references/mcp.md.covers: mcp config structure, local/remote transport types, OAuth, environment variables, CLI commands

references/agents.md.covers: Built-in agents (build/plan/general/explore), custom agent fields, markdown file format, bash glob permissions

references/permissions.md.covers: Permission actions (ask/allow/deny), all tool types, bash glob patterns, global vs per-agent permissions

references/tui.md.covers: tui.json structure, all keybind actions, theme configuration, mouse/scroll/diff settings

references/config-schema.md.covers: Full opencode.json schema — all top-level fields, server, commands, instructions, formatters, compaction, skills, plugins, watcher, managed settings
